2/11/26

- Unified Transfer API - need to pull in Product

- We think "program transfer" is a different type of transfer - separate from Adjustment

- Jackson Hewitt

- Taylor writing up a solution overview on integration with TPG solutions

- 7-Eleven

- They really want the UX hosted by Green Dot but integrated within 7Rewards App

- WMMC - migrated off PTS to ACI in the past

- Middle layer was all on legacy stack
- UX was talking to GBOS
- Cards fail KYC have different treatment of where they can be spent
- GBOS cards were only spendable in person- hit t revenue from ecommerce payments
- Sankeerth, Michelle & Taylor - discusssing how to get better data and metrics when making decisions that will have business impact

- Planning for offsite

- Framework for conversation
- Partner-driven roadmap

2/5/26

- Taylor is in Bentonville - it's a cool place!

- Good meetings with Walmart
- There are a few novel things that we proposed that we could dig into
- $30MM in Tailfin funding
- Peddler solution with retail cards issued at WMMC?

- Kroger wants to do Cash Pickup - needs to be added to the RESTful retail APIs

- This is a method for returning money from the Fiserv Bill Pay offering

- Stablecoin - delegated authorization
- Impressed
- GBOS stack didn't allow ecommerce spending on MPNR (non-reloadable) cards

- Synthesized view of insights from our prospects

- Delegated authorization / stablecoin wallet

1/27/26 - 2025 Review & 2026 Goal Planning

- This job has a longer ramp than other roles
- This is all positive
- Do you want to be on a commission?

- I am supportive
- Potential more upside
- Annual targets for bookings and launched programs

- My points to Taylor:

- I want to be promoted and want to talk about what it will take to get there

- You're off to a great start
- Generally it's not common to get prompoted in yoru first year
- You're paid above average in the band - commission payout will be the level up
- Paths to promotion as we grow and join the new org

- Possibility of taking dev portal at some point?

- I like working on process - but I recognize that I can "oversharpen the pencils" - so please call me out if I do too much

- We're very outcome driven - so it's a good balance to strike

- Paths to learning

- Ravi - AI agents sitting on top of source code

- We've had a budget cut that's going to impact our roadmap… boo

- Melissa - we're not going to be able to deliver on our roadmap
- Tailfin funding?
- Expand the platform …

9/24/25

- Retail API

- Universal API is essentially the same thing as the Retail API - the terminology really distinguishes from the "old" (ISO 8583) integration from the "new" (REST API)

- FSC API - "assistive interactive card sale"

- FSC API built into GBOS for PLS
- Doing KYC in store and creating a DDA
- Is there a "logic tree" for what happens at POS and how that maps to integration options?
- Hit up John Granish for help too

- What does "Point of Banking" mean?

- Cash Loads - alternate way to integrate swipe
